title: Annoying Villagers : Player Npc Weapons Expansion
description: Add more weapons for Annoying Villagers Player Npc on spawning
body:
**Annoying Villagers : Player Npc Weapons Expansion** is an add-on that adds more weapons for Player NPCs from Annoying Villagers mod when they are spawned.

⚠️ Feel free to suggest me another mods to add into this mod. But the weapons should be balance, craftable with iron, diamond not from Boss Fight

List of compatible mods: - [Dungeons And Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeons-and-combat) - [Epic Fight - Rapier Moveset Addon](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight-rapier-moveset-addon) - [Epic Knights: Shields Armor and Weapons](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-knights-shields-armor-and-weapons) - [EpicFight : Resurrection](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epicfight-resurrection) - [Samurai Dynasty](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-samurais) - [Simply Swords](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-swords) - [Spartan Weaponry](https://modrinth.com/mod/spartan-weaponry) - [Weapons of miracles](https://modrinth.com/mod/weapons-of-miracles)
